ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "aqi" REAL /* Air Quality Index (AQI) */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* Particulate Matter (PM2.5) */,
  "hi" REAL /* Heat Index (HI) */,
  "uvi" REAL /* Ultra Violet Index (UVI) */,
  "wci" REAL /* Wind Chill Index (WCI) */,
  "wr" REAL /* Wind Rating (WR) */,
  "rf" REAL /* Rainfall (RF) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "ci_rank" TEXT /* Ranking of the environmental conditions based on the parameters */,
  "qualified_rule" INTEGER /* Qualified rule for the environmental conditions */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location where the data was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "forecast_model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the forecasting model */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the location entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the location entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
